ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Feb-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Continued To Dec-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Heather Stoneman, via ZOOM, for Ralf Huck, Executor.

The court begins by pointing to the issue of notice to the Executor's brother. Counsel advises that she intended to file a declaration to address the notice issue but could not do so by today and reports that the brother has not been served. The court confirms with counsel that all creditors have been paid and counsel advises that she will provide proof of payment to the court. The court advises counsel that it will be continuing this matter for Dec-13 and instructs her to have courtesy copies of all filings in this matter delivered to the assigned Examiner by Dec-03.

The First and Final Report, etc., is continued to Dec-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Continued To Jun-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman, via ZOOM, counsel for Ralf Huck, Personal Representative.

The Court reminds counsel that the court has yet to receive an Inventory and Appraisal or a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration. Counsel reports that she had forwarded the Inventory and Appraisal to probate referee assigned to this matter, Michael Kasolas, to an address that she had found for him via Google, but that address was out of date. Counsel reports that the Inventory and Appraisal has been sent to the referee to an updated address and is waiting for its return to file it with the court. The court advises counsel that it will continue this matter one additional time but that she will need to file at least one of the previously mentioned petitions by the next calling of this matter.

Status on close of estate is continued to June 30, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Stoneman is to have the Inventory and Appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration on file by June 21, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Continued To Jun-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman appeared by zoom for Ralf Huck (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there is no final inventory and appraisal, nor a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Ms. Stoneman stated that the Petitioner went to Germany at the start of the pandemic, that they lost touch, that they are back in touch and that she is working on filing a petition as soon as possible. Ms. Stoneman also stated that the Petitioner is back from Germany and ideally, she would like to file a petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to June 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Stoneman is to have the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration on file by May 26, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Carranza. Not reported.
